name: noUiSlider
when_to_use: 需要多柄范围、柄间 margin/limit/padding 约束或非线性刻度时用它,而非叠两个原生 range——原生在多柄碰撞、键盘可达与约束同步上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能正确写单柄 range;多柄最小距离、上限距离、边界 padding、触控和非线性区间会漂移,noUiSlider 用一个确定配置同时闭合这些约束。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need multiple range handles, margin/limit/padding constraints between handles, or a nonlinear scale instead of stacking two native range inputs. Native implementations fail on multi-handle collisions, keyboard accessibility, and synchronized constraints.
en.why_valuable: AI can only implement a single-handle range correctly by default. Minimum and maximum handle distances, boundary padding, touch, and nonlinear intervals drift; noUiSlider satisfies these constraints together with one deterministic configuration.

data_in.note: The entire data object is passed directly to noUiSlider.create(target,data). The number of scalars in start determines the handle count; get() returns either one value or an array of the same length.

schema.start: number | number[] - one initial value per handle
schema.range: {min:number,max:number} | Record<string,number|[number,number]> - required value domain or nonlinear scale
schema.limit?: number - maximum distance between handles is unrestricted by default

data_in.note: 整个 data 对象直接传 noUiSlider.create(target,data);start 的标量数量决定手柄数,get() 返回单值或同长度数组。

schema.start: number | number[] —— 每个手柄一个初值
schema.range: {min:number,max:number} | Record<string,number|[number,number]> —— 必填值域/非线性刻度
schema.limit?: number —— 默认不限制柄间最大距离

uplink.widget: 消费 AI 自行在确认控件处理器中读取 slider.get(),再拼 sendPrompt 文案;本条不预设统一事件出口。
uplink.codex: 消费 AI 自行读取 slider.get() 并调用 sendFollowUpMessage。
uplink.artifact: artifact 无上行;提供当前标量/数组 JSON 下载导出兜底。

carriers.widget: supported:无依赖;样式 link 与 DOM 均可封闭在 shadowRoot
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + CSS,无 worker/wasm/uplink 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: +esm scan: 0 `document.head` and no style injection -> CSS is a separate file (nouislider.min.css) that the boot loads into shadowRoot; lib never injects styles. 0 `document.body` -> DOM built inside the target el, tooltips render inside the slider element (no body portals). globalEvents=yes: during drag it attaches pointer/mouse/touch listeners to element.ownerDocument (uses ownerDocument, not hardcoded document) and removes them on release/destroy (removeEventListener present) — transient and cleaned, not leaked. shadowCompatible=conditional: works in shadow DOM (drag tracking via ownerDocument resolves to the host document, events still fire) provided the separate CSS is loaded into the shadow root as the boot does.
